name: Chocolate-Amaretto Cheesecake - Gbdp78b
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chocolate wafer crumbs into the bottom of a 7-inch springform pan.
2. In a food processor, combine cream cheese and the next seven ingredients. Process until smooth.
3. Add egg and process just until blended.
4. Fold in chocolate morsels.
5. Slowly pour the mixture over the crumbs in the pan.
6. Bake at 300°F for 65 to 70 minutes or until the cheesecake is set.
7. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack. Cover and chill at least 8 hours.
8. Remove sides of the pan, and transfer the cheesecake to a serving platter.
9. Garnish with chocolate curls if desired.
Protein-6.8 / Fat-7.9 / Carbohydrate-27.2 / Cholesterol-.36 / Iron-0.8 / Sodium 289 / Calcium 58
From the Light & Easy Cooking Collection-1990 Oxmoor House Inc. A cake for Lovers! John
